evals.prompt: 帮我把 ./logo.png 上传到七牛的 my-bucket 里
evals.expected_output: Should run pre-flight checks (qshell --version, qshell user ls), then check file size, use fput for small files, and show the access URL after upload
expectations: The assistant checks qshell installation by running qshell --version
The assistant checks authentication by running qshell user ls
The assistant checks the file size before choosing upload method
The assistant uses qshell fput for files under 100MB
The assistant runs qshell domains to get the access URL after upload

evals.prompt: 列出 test-bucket 里所有以 images/ 开头的文件
evals.expected_output: Should run pre-flight checks, then use listbucket2 with --prefix images/. Since user said 'all', omitting --limit is acceptable.
expectations: The assistant uses qshell listbucket2 with --prefix images/
The assistant either uses --limit or explains why it was omitted (user asked for all files)

evals.prompt: 删除 production-bucket 里的 temp/debug.log 文件
evals.expected_output: Should run pre-flight checks, show file info with stat, and ask for user confirmation before deleting
expectations: The assistant runs qshell stat to show file information before deletion
The assistant asks for user confirmation before executing qshell delete
The assistant does NOT execute qshell delete without user confirmation

evals.prompt: qshell 怎么安装？我是 Windows 系统
evals.expected_output: Should provide Windows-specific installation instructions including downloading from GitHub releases and adding to PATH
expectations: The assistant mentions downloading from GitHub releases
The assistant mentions the Windows-specific binary (qshell-windows-amd64)
The assistant explains how to add qshell to the system PATH
The assistant suggests running qshell --version to verify installation
